englishDefinitions: Worked hard or suffered difficulties in order to earn success, respect, or a better position.
Completed the necessary difficult experience before achieving something.
persianTranslation: حقم را با تلاش به دست آورده‌ام
examples: I started as an assistant and paid my dues for years.
She feels she has paid her dues and deserves a promotion.
After ten years of night shifts, I've paid my dues.
